---
name: Feature or adapter request
about: A new channel adapter or SDK capability
labels: enhancement
---

**What do you want**
A new channel? A capability on an existing adapter (typing, reactions, attachments)? An SDK ergonomic?

**The use case**
What agent are you building, and what does this unblock?

**Willing to contribute it?**
Adapters are deliberately small — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#adding-a-new-channel-adapter). If yes, say so and we'll help you land it.
